allow: PowerShell($ports = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001,3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ports\) { $ports | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output "Ports cleared")

PowerShell(try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/@baneung-pack/grid" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("@baneung-pack/grid latest: {0}" -f $r.'dist-tags'.latest\) } catch { Write-Output "404 - not yet" })

PowerShell(try { $prs = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/AhanSehoon/-baneung-ui/pulls?state=open" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($prs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Output "No open PRs" } else { $prs | Select-Object number, title, html_url | Format-List } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($pr = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/AhanSehoon/-baneung-ui/pulls/1" -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("Title: {0}" -f $pr.title\); Write-Output \("Branch: {0} -> {1}" -f $pr.head.ref, $pr.base.ref\); Write-Output ""; Write-Output "Files changed:"; $files = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/AhanSehoon/-baneung-ui/pulls/1/files" -UseBasicParsing | ConvertFrom-Json; $files | Select-Object filename, status, additions, deletions | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000,3001,3002 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "ports cleared")

PowerShell(try { $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://registry.npmjs.org/@baneung-pack/grid" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("latest: {0} | versions: {1}" -f $r.'dist-tags'.latest, \($r.versions.PSObject.Properties.Name -join ', '\)\) } catch { Write-Output "404 - not yet" })

PowerShell(try { $prs = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/AhanSehoon/-baneung-ui/pulls?state=open" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($prs.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Output "No open PRs" } else { $prs | Select-Object number, title | Format-Table } } catch { Write-Output "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
